commit.message:
Implement theme system (Light / Dark / System default)

Wires the existing Settings > Theme dropdown to actual visual changes:
- Four CoffeeSettings colour accessors (ThemePanelBg, ThemeTextColor,
  ThemeDimTextColor, ThemeOutlineColor) return palette values per theme
- SyncAllWindows() broadcasts MSG_THEME_CHANGED to all open windows
- Custom Draw() methods (ParticleGaugeView, SieveDistView, CalHistView,
  ExtractionBarView, RoastGaugeView, ThumbView) use theme colours for
  backgrounds, outlines, tick marks, and labels
- BTextView tips areas update view/text colour on MSG_THEME_CHANGED and
  in constructors so newly opened windows inherit the active theme
- Coffee-colour gradients and extraction zone colours are unchanged

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix imported results weighted_total not excluding efficiency

The engine computed weighted_total WITH efficiency before the import
code overrode efficiency to 0/N/A, so the stored weighted_total already
included D4. Rescoring then recomputed the same value, appearing unchanged.
Now recompute weighted_total after marking efficiency as N/A.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: ai-benchmark
repository.description: Benchmarking YugabyteDB across different coding agents

commit.message:
optimize all DSP crates: eliminate per-frame allocations, add golden tolerance tests

fractal-dsp: cache FFT plans/Hann window in SpectralPlan, modulo-free tiling,
in-place filters, pre-allocated feedback buffers, single params clone in bounce.
lossy-dsp: pre-allocate all STFT frame buffers (magnitudes, phases, proc_mag,
compressed, envelope, inv_env, shaped), in-place standard_degrade/shape_delta.
reverb-dsp: stack-hoisted gains arrays, precomputed blended matrix, process_wet()
to avoid params clone in stereo path.

38 golden value tolerance tests added across all three crates (TOL=1e-6).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix black screen on restrictive networks + auto-reconnect on skip

- Add TURN relay servers (openrelay.metered.ca) for users behind
  restrictive NATs (UAE/Dubai, corporate networks) where STUN-only
  connections fail and produce black video screens
- Server: auto re-queue the skipped/disconnected partner so they
  instantly search for a new match (no reload needed)
- Client: on partner-disconnected, auto-switch to "waiting" state
  instead of showing manual "Stranger disconnected" button
- Only enforce recentPartners avoidance when 5+ people are in queue,
  so small user bases can rematch the same person

commit.message:
fix: 같은 브라우저에서 다른 닉네임 참여 시 중복 덮어쓰기 방지

Firebase Anonymous Auth uid가 브라우저 탭 간 공유되어,
같은 기기에서 서로 다른 닉네임으로 입장하면 Firestore 문서가
덮어써지는 문제를 수정.

participantId = userId + hash(nickname) 형태로 변경하여
닉네임별 고유 문서를 생성하도록 개선.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(admin): raise HIGH REDIS POOL threshold 500→900

At 521+ active RPC connections, ~562 Redis clients is proportional
and expected (ratio ~1.08 per connection). The old threshold of 500
was set for 80-130 active connections. 900 allows up to ~830 active
connections before alerting, appropriate alarm for a real pool explosion
like the 1218 pre-upgrade incident.

commit.message:
Fix NHL SHOTS prop grading: use shot attempts (S) not shots on goal (SOG)

ESPN reports S (shot attempts) and SOG (shots on goal) separately.
Sportsbook SHOTS props mean shot attempts. The stat map checked SOG
first, returning 0 for all players → all SHOTS graded as LOSS.

Fixed: S now checked first. Re-graded 12 today + cleared 50 historical.
Example: Rinzel OVER 1.5 → actual=2 shots → WIN (was LOSS with SOG=0).

commit.message:
fix: reduce pgvector dimensions from 3072 to 1536 for Neon HNSW compatibility

Neon HNSW index limit is 2000 dimensions. OpenAI text-embedding-3-large
supports dimension reduction via the dimensions parameter with excellent
quality retention at 1536.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix login timing attack, email case bugs, volume leak, and admin deletion race

- Constant-time login: always run bcrypt even when user doesn't exist
- Normalize emails to lowercase on signup and login (matches OIDC behavior)
- Clean up Docker workspace volume on agent deletion (prevents disk leak)
- Use advisory lock for last-admin deletion check (prevents race condition)
- Use full SHA-256 hash for token blacklist keys

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- signInWithPopup 팝업 닫힘 시 window focus로 로딩 상태 리셋
- 페이지 구현 시 디자인 시스템 우선 사용 규칙 추가 (CLAUDE.md)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: serve vsda stubs, fix WS binary frames and header forwarding in editor proxy

- Serve stub responses for vsda_bg.wasm and vsda.js (code-server doesn't
  include Microsoft's proprietary vsda module, causing 404 console errors)
- Use ws.raw.send() for binary data — Elysia's ws.send() JSON-stringifies
  objects including Uint8Array, corrupting binary WebSocket frames
- Capture request headers in resolve() so Sec-WebSocket-Protocol is
  properly forwarded to upstream code-server

feat: smart find -exec evaluation with recursive command checking (#31) (#32)

Instead of blindly flagging all find -exec commands, extract the exec'd
command and evaluate it against warden rules recursively (like xargs).
Safe commands (grep, cat) are allowed; dangerous ones (rm -rf, sudo)
are still flagged.
